query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_rows FROM premiumTracking;

SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(recordedAt, '%Y-%m') AS month,
  type,
  strategy,
  COUNT(*) AS count,
  SUM(CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS total_amount
FROM premiumTracking
WHERE recordedAt >= '2025-11-01'
GROUP BY month, type, strategy
ORDER BY month, type;
